Conveyancing Family Law Wills & Probate About Contact

Expert Legal Services in Cardiff

Harrison & Co Solicitors is an SRA-regulated law firm based in Cardiff, providing conveyancing, family law, and wills & probate services to clients across South Wales since 2005.

Our team of 12 solicitors handles over 500 transactions per year with a client satisfaction rating of 4.8/5.

Our Services

  • Residential Conveyancing — from £850 + VAT
  • Family Law — fixed fee initial consultations from £150
  • Wills & Probate — simple wills from £250 + VAT

Conveyancing Process

The conveyancing process in Cardiff typically takes between 8 and 12 weeks from offer to completion. Our SRA-regulated solicitors guide you through every stage, from initial instruction through to exchange and completion. We handle all searches, title checks, and Land Registry applications on your behalf. Our team has completed over 2,000 residential transactions in the last five years, giving us deep expertise in the Cardiff property market. We work with all major mortgage lenders and can coordinate directly with your broker to ensure a smooth timeline. Every client receives a dedicated case handler, a clear fee estimate before we begin, and regular progress updates throughout. We are members of the Law Society Conveyancing Quality Scheme (CQS), which means we meet the highest industry standards for residential conveyancing work. If you are buying or selling property in Cardiff, Newport, Barry, or anywhere in South Wales, we can help.

Family Law Services

Harrison & Co provides compassionate and expert family law advice across Cardiff and South Wales. Our family law solicitors handle divorce proceedings, child arrangement orders, financial settlements, prenuptial agreements, and domestic abuse injunctions. We are members of Resolution, the national organisation of family justice professionals committed to a constructive approach. Initial consultations are available from £150 on a fixed-fee basis, with no obligation to proceed. We understand that family matters are personal and sensitive, which is why we offer evening appointments and can arrange meetings at a time that suits you. Our team has over 40 years of combined family law experience and handles approximately 200 family cases per year.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does conveyancing cost in Cardiff?

Our residential conveyancing fees start from £850 plus VAT. The total cost depends on the property value and transaction complexity. We provide a full written estimate before you instruct us.

How long does the conveyancing process take?

The typical conveyancing timeline in Cardiff is 8 to 12 weeks from offer to completion. Delays can occur if there are issues with the chain, searches, or mortgage approvals.

Do you offer fixed fees for family law?

Yes, we offer fixed-fee initial consultations from £150. For ongoing cases, we provide a clear cost estimate at the outset so you know what to expect.

Are you SRA regulated?

Yes. Harrison & Co Solicitors is authorised and regulated by the Solicitors Regulation Authority. Our SRA number is 123456.
